mainTaskCompletionDiscord.trigger: When main finishes a task assigned directly by haolun in the main direct-chat session and the task is actually complete.
doNotSendFor: background upkeep not directly assigned by haolun

mustInclude: pointer that the full report is in the control UI
format.template: <@1049450008505757706> hazoc finished: {very_short_result}. Like {tiny_analogy}. Full report is in the control UI.

implementation.pattern: Create a one-shot immediate agentTurn job with announce delivery to the Discord target and a prompt that outputs exactly the final notification line.
